headline: Assessing Enphase Energy (ENPH) Valuation After Q1 Earnings Beat And PowerMatch Rollout
summary: Enphase Energy (ENPH) is in focus after first quarter 2026 adjusted earnings came in ahead of expectations, while revenue declined, in conjunction with the broader rollout of its PowerMatch battery technology across North America. See our latest analysis for Enphase Energy. The share price has surged recently, with a 30 day share price return of 101.95% and year to date share price return of 102.55%. However, the 3 year total shareholder return is down 62.41%, suggesting that shorter term...
